scripts.build: pnpm --filter core build && pnpm --filter config build && pnpm --filter db build && pnpm --filter worker build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter core build && pnpm --filter config build && pnpm --filter db build && pnpm --filter worker build && pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
